item.title: fuk AirBnB
item.description: cunts ruined my vacation, said they had water damage in a place that we found a really good deal on (the morning of us driving to the place). then offered us a crap place in return, apparently this happens quiet often. Bait and switch....
item.dc:creator: rhuala

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Thursday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
good choices but i really like Sofia Falcone currently .. greetings online friends
mmm hmm
soup > a dj
i saw that first also
yes
ewww.. diet coke
TIL i should be eating former Iraqi dictator Saddam Hussein
dang
accept damnit
not sure how the text relates to the picture but i like it ok
i guess
the amount of political stuff on here is crazy these days
get it together marvin (in heaven)
sure why not
RIP Gam Gam
ok
holler at your boy
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: She s had a hell of a week
item.dc:creator: ilikespreadsheets

item.title: Posting this here in memory of my baby. I’m so heartbroken and I can’t believe he’s gone. I love you little Ezra. I’m so sad that I’m not the first thing you got to see when you first opened your eyes. I hope my sister is taking care of you.

item.title: Have a Great Wednesday
item.dc:creator: merebabaslic

item.title: Free community college for all Michigan graduates!
item.description: Amazing stuff is happening here since we ended gerrymandering! MV edit: Forgot the link to the story https://www.bestcolleges.com/news/michigan-high-school-grads-free-tuition-community-college/ Good luck to other states trying to claw back control of their govt this election cycle!
item.dc:creator: dojustice

item.title: 10/? The Pope
item.description: “The vibes are immaculate, like the conception.” 10/? ✝️ The Pope I am doing a costume a day for the entire month and I am raising money for charity while doing so! Read more about it here :) https://imgur.com/gallery/see-y-all-tomorrow-GJKtKLD This one was simple as hell, but it’s been making me laugh since I sat down to sew it
item.dc:creator: josiemarcellino

item.title: Give her that riz. Is that what they say?
item.dc:creator: roaduardo

item.title: Fresh FRIDAY daily dump for you coffee #383 (hang in there the weekend is almost here)
item.description:
1. LOTR will RUIN the mood? WTF! Divorce here now!
2. Nope, no way to to guess the guy, absolutely no way...
3. "Yeah, boss I'm working"
4. Wait, this isn't photoshop?
5. "I'm gonna eat you!" "LOL, yea sure man whatever"
6. Here is some Friday motivation for ya
7. MILK THAT AI REAL GOOD
8. This explains a lot
9. Modern problems require old school solutions
10
11. I like how he started pulling like that scene with Neo and the helicopter
12. "I'm going to rev my bike and wake up the neighborhood again tonight!"
13. Got us there, but on the other hand toast tastes so good
14
15. Thanks to the two-three people who made it to the end of this dump. When I'm not busy making questionable life choices on the internet, I've been pouring my soul into a little passion project. If you got a kick out of this dump, you're going to love my game: "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)." Think "The Stanley Parable" but with even more chaos and quirky characters. Here is my latest addition - wall signs with cake facts on them. 50% are true, 50% are made up by me. Can you guess which one this is? Can you imagine? A first-person game mixed with humor? Anyway, please wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ It would mean the world to me and my brother if you checked out the game and gave it a wishlist. It won't disappoint. I promise. Just, whatever you do, don't press the big red button!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.dc:creator: PedstrStealth

item.title: Wisconsin Evangelical Megachurch Pastor, Gabriel Mills, Arrested. ...Again
item.description:
Arrested for using a parishioner’s phone to send himself nude photos of the parishioner’s wife. Rearrested after another survivor came forward. Don't give your phone with nudes of your wife to a pastor...is the lesson here, I think.
https://kenoshacountyeye.com/2024/10/09/journey-church-pastor-re-arrested-after-todays-court-hearing-for-more-charges-involving-second-victim/
item.dc:creator: UnattendedDeviant

item.title: Thank you for your service
item.description: I know that not everything at "Old Imgur" was perfect, but "New Imgur" has become a clownshow.
item.dc:creator: DerpMeister

item.title: Chicago info dump
item.description:
I stole these.
Having spent a lot of time in Chicago, most are true.
Thin crust or bust!
Tamale man is the real MVP!
Fact 13 is the truth.
So many 5am bar trips. Especially if you ever spent time at The Exit. I really love Chicago and miss it dearly. Overdue for a visit. Happy Friday everyone!
item.dc:creator: ElbowDeepInAMoose

item.title: Memes and stuff
item.description:
Prophetess is a dream job.
Not that God existed in the first place...
Thankfully, I've been able to address my hangriness before I get bad most of the time.
I have been told that I'm a snack before.
Love me some bebop
It why I always tell my bf to take a shower.
Sent this to my bf....
Adderall has helped a lot, but I still struggle.
Guilty!
Valid
Can I sub mushrooms for acid?
I use this on my mom.
Not anymore
Look, I may be a masochist, but I couldn't handle that.
It always makes great noises.
Makes me feel loved.
Is this why I like it and that my therapist supports it?
That's domme talk alright.
Oof
Electric wizard for those that don't know.
Pretty sure I know some people would do this as a joke...
If there's a cat involved, there's a 120% higher chance of me being interested.
I sent this to my bf because he loves getting people with that game.
item.dc:creator: wonkysaurusrex

item.title: Something easy to dress up a cake
item.description: Maybe you're not that crafty, but this is so easy. You could even use a melted chocolate bar.
item.dc:creator: countervail247365

item.title: well that sucks
item.description: For the curious, here's the original line art. It's Black prismacolor on drawing paper. ( some people did not get that the first depiction was a vampire...I drew a kind of Nosferatu version. So I redrew him as the more recognizable Dracula ) HAPPY HALLOWEEN!
item.dc:creator: JKBenton

item.title: 10 Year Cake Day Meme Dump
item.description: A whole decade on Imgur! Thanks for one hell of a ride! Some of you should be institutionalised. Stay cool cool dudes.
